## Checklist

- [ ] `bun test skills/harness/tests` passes
- [ ] No hardcoded model names (the engine never prescribes a model — it inherits the runtime's)
- [ ] No paid pack content, secrets, or `.env` values added to the engine
- [ ] **I have read and agree to the Nirvana-OS CLA v1.0** ([CLA.md](../CLA.md))
